issues.title: @source directive inconsistency across apps
issues.description: Three apps (auth, landing, playground) include an extra '@source "../\*\*/*.{ts,tsx}"' directive to scan their own source files, while four apps (store, admin, payments, studio) do not. This means Tailwind may miss local class usage in store/admin/payments/studio if the JIT scanner doesn't pick up app-local files via the ui/globals import chain.
issues.fix: Add '@source "../\*\*/*.{ts,tsx}";' to store, admin, payments, and studio globals.css — OR — confirm that Tailwind v4's automatic content detection already covers these apps and the extra @source is redundant in auth/landing/playground. Either way, all apps should be consistent.

issues.title: CSS variables in packages/ui/src/styles/colors.css use hex values instead of OKLCH
issues.description: The shared color palette definition uses hex (#ff4890, #1a1a1a, #0e0e10, etc.) instead of the OKLCH format mandated by the Tailwind CSS rules. The project rule states: 'PREFER: OKLCH format — Colors use OKLCH in theme.' This affects the single source of truth for all apps in the monorepo.
issues.rule: tailwind.md — 'Use OKLCH Colors: CORRECT: OKLCH format — --primary: oklch(0.205 0 0); AVOID: Legacy formats — --primary: hsl(0 0% 20%); / --primary: #333333;'
issues.fix: Convert hex color values to OKLCH format in packages/ui/src/styles/colors.css. Example: '--brand: #ff4890' → '--brand: oklch(0.65 0.26 345)'. Use a converter tool (e.g. https://oklch.com) to translate each hex value.
issues.note: This is a KISS-informed warning — the colors work correctly as hex; converting to OKLCH is a standards-compliance improvement. Since this is a shared file that affects all apps simultaneously, the fix is straightforward but should be done carefully.

patterns.description: No non-semantic Tailwind palette colors found in any .tsx files across all apps. No direct text-red-*, text-green-*, text-blue-*, text-gray-*, text-slate-*, text-yellow-*, text-amber-*, bg-red-*, bg-green-*, bg-blue-*, bg-gray-*, bg-slate-*, text-yellow-*, text-amber-* classes found.
patterns.verdict: All component color usage is fully semantic.

patterns.description: No hardcoded hex colors (bg-[#...], text-[#...]) found in any .tsx component files across all apps.
patterns.verdict: No arbitrary color values in components.

patterns.description: All 7 apps (store, admin, payments, studio, auth, landing, playground) include the required '@source "../../../../packages/ui/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}";' directive to ensure Tailwind scans the shared ui package.
patterns.verdict: UI package scanning is correctly configured in all apps.

patterns.description: All apps import shared theme via '@import "ui/globals";' which points to packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css — a single source of truth for CSS variables, theme configuration, and semantic utility classes.
patterns.verdict: CSS consistency is maintained through shared package imports. The theme and utility classes are identical across all apps by design.

patterns.description: The semantic utility class system is comprehensive: surface-success/warning/destructive/info, status-healthy/warning/critical/info, indicator-*, icon-* classes are all defined centrally and map to semantic tokens.
patterns.verdict: Excellent semantic color class system in place.
